My co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.

Given your experience in logistics, I was hoping to get your opinion.

For some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.

We're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points logistic firms face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.

We're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.

If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your carrier invoices and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing discrepancies, would that be useful?

Would you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?

Best,
Seth

P.S. Happy to drop by your office at CT Hub 2 if that's easier!

We're building an AI assistant that's always one step ahead. It proactively checks in - giving you morning updates on pending invoice reconciliations, tracking changes in carrier rates or surcharges, or running daily audits on freight bills for errors without you having to ask.

Curious whether teams in logistics would actually use this from WhatsApp or email - would love your perspective if you have 15 mins.

Best,
Seth

Hi Vir,

Given your experience in logistics, I was hoping to get your opinion.

We're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points logistic firms face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.

We're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.

If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your carrier invoices and other shipping documents and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing all overcharges and discrepancies, would that be useful?

Would you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?

Best,
Seth
